nodes.name: 鹱形目
nodes.summary: 鹱形目（Procellariiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联115种鸟类，如加岛信天翁、短尾信天翁、Northern royal albatross等115种鸟类。

nodes.name: 背黒水薙鳥
nodes.summary: 背黒水薙鳥（Puffinus bannermani）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Bannerman's shearwater。

nodes.name: 火山列岛 (日本)
nodes.summary: 火山列岛 (日本)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括小天鹅、日本叉尾海燕、Bannerman's shearwater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 剪水鹱属
nodes.summary: 剪水鹱属（Puffinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Christmas shearwater、Galápagos shearwater、Fluttering shearwater等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鹱科

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: Bannerman's shearwater
nodes.summary: Bannerman's shearwater (Puffinus bannermani) is a seabird in the family Procellariidae formerly considered conspecific with Audubon's shearwater (Puffinus lherminieri). Range Little is known of this species other than that it breeds in the Volcano Islands in the Ogasawara Group to the southwest of Japan and doesn't seem to range far from this area. Population The species population size has not been estimated but is assessed to be decreasing. Diet and Habitat Not much is known about this species and more research is required to obtain an understanding of its ecology. Based on the ecology of closely related species, P. bannermani is thought likely to feed on fish, squid and cephalopods, by surface-seizing, underwater pursuit, including diving and plunging, and pattering (del Hoyo et al. 1992, Brooke 2004). It is likely to nest in rock crevices or burrows and form colonies (del Hoyo et al. 1992). References
